caption: The video features a presentation by Jerry Michalski, who is seen on a webcam feed in the top right corner of the screen. The main focus of the video is a complex diagram displayed on a computer screen, which appears to be a visual representation of interconnected concepts and processes related to systems thinking and problem-solving. The diagram includes various nodes with labels such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "moments," "we have a problem," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," and "future of society." These nodes are connected by arrows, indicating relationships and flow between different ideas and stages. Jerry seems to be explaining or discussing this diagram, likely elaborating on the connections and significance of each element within the context of systems thinking and societal challenges. The background shows multiple browser tabs open, suggesting that the presentation might be part of a larger discussion or research session.
